privileged_info_summary: The task uses the Muncie dataset, a real-world HEC-RAS example model from USACE. Analysis of the HDF5 geometry property tables reveals exactly one conveyance monotonicity violation at River Station 12492.03 (conveyance drops from 1,436,563 to 1,388,802 at elevation 951.86). The maximum conveyance value across the reach is 22,813,392 at River Station 8434.332. The most downstream River Station is 237.6455. The verifier uses an incorrectly generated mock ground truth if real extraction fails, but empirical data confirms these values.
